name: Adaptability
shortEffect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5x to 2x.
fullEffect: This Pokemon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5x.

name: Aerilate
shortEffect: Turns the bearer's normal moves into flying moves and strengthens them to 1.3x their power.
fullEffect: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into flying-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3x their power.

name: Aftermath
shortEffect: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon is knocked out by a move that makes contact, the move's user takes 1/4 its maximum HP in damage.

name: Air Lock
shortEffect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
fullEffect:
While this Pokemon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

This ability functions identically to cloud nine.

name: Analytic
shortEffect: Strengthens moves to 1.3x their power when moving last.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves have 1.3x their power when it moves last in a turn.

future sight and doom desire are unaffected.

name: Anger Point
shortEffect: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon receives a critical hit, its Attack rises to the maximum of 6 stages.

This ability will still take effect if the critical hit is received by a substitute.

name: Anger Shell
shortEffect: When the Pokemon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.
fullEffect: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokemon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

name: Anticipation
shortEffect: Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, self destruct, explosion, or a one-hit KO move.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle, if one of its opponents has a move that is super effective against it, self destruct, explosion, or a one-hit knockout move, all participating trainers are notified.

The move itself is not revealed; only that there is such a move.  Moves that inflict typeless damage, such as future sight, and moves of variable type, such as hidden power, count as their listed types.  counter, metal burst, mirror coat, and one-hit KO moves to which this Pokemon is immune do not trigger this ability.

name: Arena Trap
shortEffect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.  Eluded by flying-types and Pokemon in the air.
fullEffect:
While this Pokemon is in battle, opposing Pokemon cannot flee or switch out.  flying-type Pokemon and Pokemon in the air, e.g. due to levitate or magnet rise, are unaffected.

Pokemon with run away can still flee.  Pokemon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.

name: Armor Tail
shortEffect: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.
fullEffect: The mysterious tail covering the Pokemon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokemon or its allies.

name: Aroma Veil
shortEffect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
fullEffect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.

name: Aura Break
shortEffect: Makes dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types.
fullEffect: While this Pokemon is on the field, dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types to 2/3 their power, rather than strengthening them.

name: Bad Dreams
shortEffect: Damages sleeping opponents for 1/8 their max HP after each turn.
fullEffect: Opposing Pokemon take 1/8 of their maximum HP in damage after each turn while they are asleep.

name: Ball Fetch
shortEffect: If the Pokemon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poke Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.
fullEffect: At any time after the first Poke Ball is thrown and fails to catch a Pokemon, at the end of a turn, if a Pokemon with Ball Fetch is on the field and not holding another item, it will pick up the same type of ball as the first one thrown.

name: Battery
shortEffect: Ally Pokemon's moves have their power increased to 1.3x.
fullEffect: Ally Pokemon's moves have their power increased to 1.3x.

name: Battle Armor
shortEffect: Protects against critical hits.
fullEffect:
Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokemon.

This ability functions identically to shell armor.

name: Beads Of Ruin
shortEffect: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokemon except itself.
fullEffect: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokemon except itself.

name: Beast Boost
shortEffect: Raises this Pokemon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokemon.
fullEffect: Raises this Pokemon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokemon.

name: Berserk
shortEffect: Raises this Pokemon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
fullEffect: Whenever this Pokemon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.

name: Big Pecks
shortEffect: Protects against Defense drops.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Defense cannot be lowered by other Pokemon.

This Pokemon can still be passed negative Defense modifiers through heart swap or guard swap.

name: Blaze
shortEffect: Strengthens fire moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its fire-type moves inflict 1.5x as much regular damage.

name: Bulletproof
shortEffect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
fullEffect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.

name: Cheek Pouch
shortEffect: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
fullEffect: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.

name: Chilling Neigh
shortEffect: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokemon.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

name: Chlorophyll
shortEffect: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

name: Clear Body
shortEffect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokemon.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokemon.

This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis.  This Pokemon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through guard swap, heart swap, or power swap.

This ability functions identically to white smoke in battle.

name: Cloud Nine
shortEffect: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
fullEffect:
While this Pokemon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

This ability functions identically to air lock.

name: Color Change
shortEffect: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon takes damage from a move, the Pokemon's type changes to match the move.

If the Pokemon has two types, both are overridden.  The Pokemon must directly take damage; for example, moves blocked by a substitute will not trigger this ability, nor will moves that deal damage indirectly, such as spikes.

This ability takes effect on only the last hit of a multiple-hit attack.

In Pokemon Colosseum and XD: Gale of Darkness, this ability does not take effect on Shadow-type moves.

name: Comatose
shortEffect: This Pokemon always  acts as though it were Asleep.
fullEffect: This Pokemon always acts as though it were Asleep.  It cannot be given another status ailment; it's unaffected by yawn; it can use sleep talk; and so on.

name: Commander
shortEffect: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokemon then issues commands from there.

name: Competitive
shortEffect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
fullEffect: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.

name: Compound Eyes
shortEffect: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.3x.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves have 1.3x their accuracy.

This ability has no effect on the one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold).

Overworld: If the first Pokemon in the party has this ability, the chance of a wild Pokemon holding a particular item is raised from 50%, 5%, or 1% to 60%, 20%, or 5%, respectively.

name: Contrary
shortEffect: Inverts stat changes.
fullEffect: Whenever this Pokemon's stats would be raised, they are instead lowered by the same amount, and vice versa.

name: Corrosion
shortEffect: This Pokemon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokemon.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokemon when attempting to inflict poison.

name: Costar
shortEffect: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

name: Cotton Down
shortEffect: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stats of all Pokemon except itself.

name: Cud Chew
shortEffect: Causes the Pokemon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

name: Curious Medicine
shortEffect: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

name: Cursed Body
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokemon.
fullEffect: Moves that hit this Pokemon have a 30% chance of being Disabled afterward.

name: Cute Charm
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokemon on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being infatuated.

Overworld: If the first Pokemon in the party has this ability, any wild Pokemon whose species can be either gender has a 2/3 chance of being set to the opposite gender, and a 1/3 chance of having a random gender as usual.

name: Damp
shortEffect: Prevents self destruct, explosion, and aftermath from working while the Pokemon is in battle.
fullEffect: While this Pokemon is in battle, self destruct and explosion will fail and aftermath will not take effect.

name: Dancer
shortEffect: Whenever another Pokemon uses a dance move, this Pokemon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
fullEffect: Whenever another Pokemon uses a dance move, this Pokemon will use the same move immediately afterwards.

name: Dark Aura
shortEffect: Strengthens dark moves to 1.33x their power for all friendly and opposing Pokemon.
fullEffect: Strengthens dark moves for all friendly and opposing Pokemon.

name: Dauntless Shield
shortEffect: Boosts Defense in battle.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's Defense stat the first time the Pokemon enters a battle.

name: Dazzling
shortEffect: Opposing Pokemon cannot use priority attacks.
fullEffect: When an opposing Pokemon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokemon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

name: Defeatist
shortEffect: Halves Attack and Special Attack at 50% max HP or less.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Attack and Special Attack are halved when it has half its HP or less.

name: Defiant
shortEffect: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
fullEffect:
When any of this Pokemon's stats are lowered, its Attack rises by two stages.

If multiple stats are lowered at once, this ability takes effect with each stat lowered.

name: Delta Stream
shortEffect: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokemon.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes a mysterious air current.  A mysterious air current causes moves to not be super effective against Flying; they do neutral damage instead.  anticipation and stealth rock are not affected.

The mysterious air current ends when this Pokemon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of desolate land and primordial sea.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effect of a mysterious air current, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Desolate Land
shortEffect: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes extremely harsh sunlight.  Extremely harsh sunlight has all the properties of sunny day and also causes damaging Water moves to fail.

Extremely harsh sunlight ends when this Pokemon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of delta stream and primordial sea.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effects of extremely harsh sunlight, including allowing Water moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Disguise
shortEffect: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
fullEffect:
If this Pokemon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Mimikyu.

name: Download
shortEffect: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle, its Attack or Special Attack, whichever corresponds to its opponents' weaker total defensive stat, rises one stage.  In the event of a tie, Special Attack is raised.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during a battle.

name: Dragons Maw
shortEffect: Powers up Dragon-type moves.
fullEffect: Increases the power of Dragon-type moves used by this Pokemon by 50%.

name: Drizzle
shortEffect: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
The weather changes to rain when this Pokemon enters battle and does not end unless replaced by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokemon with this ability, drought, sand stream, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokemon will stay.

name: Drought
shortEffect: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
The weather changes to strong sunlight when this Pokemon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokemon with this ability, drizzle, sand stream, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokemon will stay.

name: Dry Skin
shortEffect: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from fire moves to 1.25x, but absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
fullEffect: This Pokemon takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn during strong sunlight, but it heals for 1/8 of its HP each turn during rain.  This Pokemon takes 1.25x as much damage from fire-type moves, but whenever a water move hits it, it heals for 1/4 its maximum HP instead.

name: Early Bird
shortEffect: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

If this Pokemon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokemon will wake up.

name: Earth Eater
shortEffect: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
fullEffect: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokemon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

name: Effect Spore
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokemon on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed, poisoned, or put to sleep, chosen at random.

Nothing is done to compensate if the move's user is immune to one of these ailments; there is simply a lower chance that the move's user will be affected.

name: Electric Surge
shortEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to electric terrain.

name: Electromorphosis
shortEffect: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
fullEffect: The Pokemon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokemon uses.

name: Emergency Exit
shortEffect: This Pokemon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
fullEffect: After this Pokemon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokemon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.

name: Fairy Aura
shortEffect: Strengthens fairy moves to 1.33x their power for all friendly and opposing Pokemon.
fullEffect: Strengthens fairy moves for all friendly and opposing Pokemon.

name: Filter
shortEffect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon takes 0.75x as much damage from moves that are super effective against it.

This ability functions identically to solid rock.

name: Flame Body
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokemon on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being burned.

Overworld: If any Pokemon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly.  This effect does not stack if multiple Pokemon have this ability or magma armor.

name: Flare Boost
shortEffect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when burned.
fullEffect: This Pokemon has 1.5x its Special Attack when burned.

name: Flash Fire
shortEffect: Protects against fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokemon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5x damage until it leaves battle.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is immune to fire-type moves.  Once this Pokemon has been hit by a Fire move, its own Fire moves will inflict 1.5x as much damage until it leaves battle.

This ability has no effect while the Pokemon is frozen.  The Fire damage bonus is retained even if the Pokemon is frozen and thawed or the ability is lost or disabled.  Fire moves will ignore this Pokemon's substitute.  This ability takes effect even on non-damaging moves, i.e. will o wisp.

name: Flower Gift
shortEffect: Increases friendly Pokemon's Attack and Special Defense to 1.5x during strong sunlight.
fullEffect:
Friendly Pokemon have 1.5x their Attack and Special Defense during strong sunlight if any friendly Pokemon has this ability.

Unlike forecast, multitype, and zen mode, this ability is not tied to its Pokemon's form change; cherrim will switch between its forms even if it loses this ability.  As such, this ability also works if obtained by a Pokemon other than Cherrim.

name: Flower Veil
shortEffect: Protects friendly grass Pokemon from having their stats lowered by other Pokemon.
fullEffect: Protects friendly grass Pokemon from having their stats lowered by other Pokemon.

name: Fluffy
shortEffect: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
fullEffect: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.

name: Forecast
shortEffect: Changes castform's type and form to match the weather.
fullEffect:
During rain, strong sunlight, or hail, this Pokemon's type changes to water, fire, or ice, respectively, and its form changes to match.

This ability has no effect for any Pokemon other than castform.

If the weather ends or becomes anything that does not trigger this ability, or a Pokemon with air lock or cloud nine enters battle, this Pokemon's type and form revert to their default.  If this ability is lost or disabled, this Pokemon cannot change its current type and form until it regains its ability.

name: Forewarn
shortEffect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle, it reveals the move with the highest base power known by any opposing Pokemon to all participating trainers.

In the event of a tie, one is chosen at random.

Moves without a listed base power are assigned one as follows:

Power | Moves
----: | -----
  160 | One-hit KO moves: fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold
  120 | Counter moves: counter, metal burst, and mirror coat
   80 | Variable power or set damage: crush grip, dragon rage, electro ball, endeavor, final gambit, flail, frustration, grass knot, gyro ball, heat crash, heavy slam, hidden power, low kick, natural gift, night shade, psywave, return, reversal, seismic toss, sonic boom, trump card, and wring out
    0 | Any such move not listed

name: Friend Guard
shortEffect: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokemon to 0.75x.
fullEffect:
All friendly Pokemon take 0.75x as much direct damage from moves while this Pokemon is in battle.

This effect stacks if multiple allied Pokemon have it.

name: Frisk
shortEffect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle, it reveals an opposing Pokemon's held item to all participating trainers.

In a double battle, if one opponent has an item, this Pokemon will Frisk that Pokemon; if both have an item, it will Frisk one at random.

name: Full Metal Body
shortEffect: Other Pokemon cannot lower this Pokemon's stats.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's stats cannot be lowered by other Pokemon's moves or abilities.  This effect only applies to normal stat modifications and not more exotic effects such as topsy turvy or power swap.

This Ability is not bypassed by mold breaker, teravolt, or turboblaze.

name: Fur Coat
shortEffect: Halves damage from physical attacks.
fullEffect: Halves damage from physical attacks.

name: Gale Wings
shortEffect: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
fullEffect: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.

name: Galvanize
shortEffect: This Pokemon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2x.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon uses a Normal moves, that move is Electric its power is 1.2x.

name: Gluttony
shortEffect: Makes the Pokemon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
fullEffect: This Pokemon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.

name: Good As Gold
shortEffect: Gives immunity to status moves.
fullEffect: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokemon full immunity to other Pokemon's status moves.

name: Gooey
shortEffect: Lowers attacking Pokemon's Speed by one stage on contact.
fullEffect: Lowers attacking Pokemon's Speed by one stage on contact.

name: Gorilla Tactics
shortEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

name: Grass Pelt
shortEffect: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
fullEffect: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.

name: Grassy Surge
shortEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to grassy terrain.

name: Grim Neigh
shortEffect: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokemon.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Guard Dog
shortEffect: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokemon to switch out also fail to work.

name: Gulp Missile
shortEffect: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

name: Guts
shortEffect: Increases Attack to 1.5x with a major status ailment.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon is asleep, burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, it has 1.5x its Attack.  This Pokemon is not affected by the usual Attack cut from a burn.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

name: Hadron Engine
shortEffect: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
fullEffect: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokemon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokemon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

name: Harvest
shortEffect: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokemon has held no items in the meantime.
fullEffect: After each turn, if the last item this Pokemon consumed was a Berry and it is not currently holding an item, it has a 50% chance of regaining that Berry, or a 100% chance during strong sunlight.

name: Healer
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of curing each adjacent ally of any major status ailment after each turn.
fullEffect: Friendly Pokemon next to this Pokemon in double and triple battles each have a 30% chance of being cured of any major status ailment after each turn.

name: Heatproof
shortEffect: Halves damage from fire moves and burns.
fullEffect: This Pokemon takes half as much damage from fire-type moves and burns.

name: Heavy Metal
shortEffect: Doubles the Pokemon's weight.
fullEffect: This Pokemon has double the usual weight for its species.

name: Honey Gather
shortEffect: The Pokemon may pick up honey after battle.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon has a chance of picking up honey after each battle.  This chance starts at 5% and rises another 5% after every tenth level: 5% from level 1-10, 10% from 11-20, and so on, up to 50% from 91-100.

This ability is checked after the battle ends, at which point any temporary ability changes have worn off.

name: Hospitality
shortEffect: When a Pokemon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.

name: Huge Power
shortEffect: Doubles Attack in battle.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Attack is doubled while in battle.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

This ability functions identically to pure power.

name: Hunger Switch
shortEffect: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode
fullEffect: The Pokemon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.

name: Hustle
shortEffect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5x damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8x.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's physical moves do 1.5x as much regular damage, but have 0.8x their usual accuracy.

Special moves are unaffected.  Moves that do set damage, such as seismic toss, have their accuracy affected, but not their damage.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokemon have their encounter rate increased.

name: Hydration
shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
fullEffect: This Pokemon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.

name: Hyper Cutter
shortEffect: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokemon.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Attack cannot be lowered by other Pokemon.

This ability does not prevent any Attack losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Attack cut from a burn.  This Pokemon can still be passed negative Attack modifiers through heart swap or power swap.

name: Ice Body
shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
fullEffect: This Pokemon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

name: Ice Face
shortEffect: The Pokemon's ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokemon's appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.
fullEffect: When an Eiscue that's in its Ice Face form is hit by a physical move, it takes no damage and changes into its Noice Face form. If a hailstorm or snowstorm begins while Eiscue is in its Noice Face form, or if it is sent out in its Noice Face form during hail, it will immediately revert to its Ice Face form.

name: Ice Scales
shortEffect: Halves damage from Special moves.
fullEffect: The Pokemon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

name: Illuminate
shortEffect: Doubles the wild encounter rate.
fullEffect:
Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.

This ability has no effect in battle.

name: Illusion
shortEffect: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokemon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon, upon being sent out, appears to have the species, nickname, and Poke Ball of the last Pokemon in the party that is able to battle.  This illusion breaks upon being hit by a damaging move.

Other damage, e.g. from weather or spikes, does not break the illusion, nor does damage done to a substitute.

If the party order becomes temporarily shuffled around as Pokemon are switched out in battle, this ability chooses the last Pokemon according to that shuffled order.

name: Immunity
shortEffect: Prevents poison.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be poisoned.  This includes bad poison.

If a Pokemon is poisoned and acquires this ability, its poison is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

name: Imposter
shortEffect: Transforms upon entering battle.
fullEffect: This Pokemon transforms into a random opponent upon entering battle.  This effect is identical to the move transform.

name: Infiltrator
shortEffect: Bypasses light screen, reflect, and safeguard.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's moves ignore light screen, reflect, and safeguard.

name: Innards Out
shortEffect: When this Pokemon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokemon had remaining.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokemon had remaining.

name: Inner Focus
shortEffect: Prevents flinching.
fullEffect: This Pokemon cannot flinch.

name: Insomnia
shortEffect: Prevents sleep.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be asleep.

This causes rest to fail altogether.  If a Pokemon is asleep and acquires this ability, it will immediately wake up; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

This ability functions identically to vital spirit in battle.

name: Intimidate
shortEffect: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle, the opponent's Attack is lowered by one stage.  In a double battle, both opponents are affected.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during a battle, but will not take effect again if lost and reobtained without leaving battle.

This ability has no effect on an opponent that has a substitute.

Overworld: If the first Pokemon in the party has this ability, any random encounter with a Pokemon five or more levels lower than it has a 50% chance of being skipped.

name: Intrepid Sword
shortEffect: Boosts Attack in battle.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's Attack stat the first time the Pokemon enters a battle.

name: Iron Barbs
shortEffect: Damages attacking Pokemon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

This ability functions identically to rough skin.

name: Iron Fist
shortEffect: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2x their power.
fullEffect:
Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2x their base power for this Pokemon.

sucker punch is not flagged as punch-based; its original, Japanese name only means "surprise attack".

name: Justified
shortEffect: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a dark move.
fullEffect:
Whenever a dark-type move hits this Pokemon, its Attack rises one stage.

The move is not negated in any way.

name: Keen Eye
shortEffect: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot have its accuracy lowered.

This ability does not prevent any accuracy losses other than stat modifiers, such as the accuracy cut from fog; nor does it prevent other Pokemon's evasion from making this Pokemon's moves less accurate.  This Pokemon can still be passed negative accuracy modifiers through heart swap.

Overworld: If the first Pokemon in the party has this ability, any random encounter with a Pokemon five or more levels lower than it has a 50% chance of being skipped.

name: Klutz
shortEffect: Prevents the Pokemon from using its held item in battle.
fullEffect:
In battle, this Pokemon cannot use its held item, nor will the item have any passive effect on the battle, positive or negative.  This Pokemon also cannot use fling.

The Speed cut from the iron ball and the effort items (the macho brace, power weight, power bracer, power belt, power lens, power band, and power anklet) is unaffected.  Items that do not directly affect the battle, such as the exp share, the amulet coin, or the soothe bell, work as usual.  All held items work as usual out of battle.

Other moves that use the held item, such as natural gift and switcheroo, work as usual.

name: Leaf Guard
shortEffect: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be given a major status ailment during strong sunlight.

This ability does not heal prior status ailments.  rest will fail altogether with this ability in effect.  yawn will immediately fail if used on this Pokemon during strong sunlight, and an already-used Yawn will fail if the weather turns to strong sunlight in the meantime.

name: Levitate
shortEffect: Evades ground moves.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is immune to ground-type moves, spikes, toxic spikes, and arena trap.

This ability is disabled during gravity or ingrain, or while holding an iron ball.  This ability is not disabled during roost.

name: Libero
shortEffect: Libero changes the Pokemon's type to that of its previously used attack.
fullEffect: Changes the Pokemon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokemon enters battle.

name: Light Metal
shortEffect: Halves the Pokemon's weight.
fullEffect: This Pokemon has half the usual weight for its species.

name: Lightning Rod
shortEffect: Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokemon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
fullEffect:
All other Pokemon's single-target electric-type moves are redirected to this Pokemon if it is an eligible target.  Other Pokemon's Electric moves raise this Pokemon's Special Attack one stage, negating any other effect on it, and cannot miss it.

If the move's intended target also has this ability, the move is not redirected.  When multiple Pokemon with this ability are possible targets for redirection, the move is redirected to the one with the highest Speed stat, or, in the case of a tie, to a random tied Pokemon.  follow me takes precedence over this ability.

If the Pokemon is a ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves, its immunity prevents the Special Attack boost.

name: Limber
shortEffect: Prevents paralysis.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed.

If a Pokemon is paralyzed and acquires this ability, its paralysis is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

name: Lingering Aroma
shortEffect: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.
fullEffect: Contact with the Pokemon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

name: Liquid Ooze
shortEffect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.
fullEffect:
Whenever a Pokemon would heal after hitting this Pokemon with a leeching move like absorb, it instead loses as many HP as it would usually gain.

dream eater is unaffected.

name: Liquid Voice
shortEffect: Sound-based moves become Water-type.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon uses a move that is sound-based, that move's type is Water.

name: Long Reach
shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves do not make contact.
fullEffect: A move used by this Pokemon will not make contact.

name: Magic Bounce
shortEffect: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon is targeted by a move flagged as being reflectable, the move is redirected to its user.

All reflectable moves are non-damaging, and most non-damaging moves that target other Pokemon are reflectable.

A move reflected by this ability or magic coat cannot be reflected back.

name: Magic Guard
shortEffect: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is immune to damage not directly caused by a move.

For example, this Pokemon takes no damage from from weather, recoil, status ailments, or spikes, but it still suffers from the Attack cut when burned, and a life orb will still power up this Pokemon's moves without damaging it.  Anything that directly depends on such damage will also not happen; for example, leech seed will neither hurt this Pokemon nor heal the opponent, and Pokemon with a jaboca berry or rowap berry will not consume the berry when hit by this Pokemon.

The following are unaffected: struggle, pain split (whether used by or against this Pokemon), belly drum, substitute, curse, moves that knock the user out, and damage from confusion.

This Pokemon will neither lose nor regain HP if it drains HP from a Pokemon with liquid ooze.

If this Pokemon is badly poisoned, the poison counter is still increased each turn; if the Pokemon loses this ability, it will begin taking as much damage as it would be if it had been taking increasing damage each turn.

name: Magician
shortEffect: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
fullEffect: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.

name: Magma Armor
shortEffect: Prevents freezing.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be frozen.

If a Pokemon is frozen and acquires this ability, it will immediately thaw out; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

Overworld: If any Pokemon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly.  This effect does not stack if multiple Pokemon have this ability or flame body.

name: Magnet Pull
shortEffect: Prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.
fullEffect:
While this Pokemon is in battle, opposing steel-type Pokemon cannot flee or switch out.

Pokemon with run away can still flee.  Pokemon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, Steel-type Pokemon have a higher encounter rate.

name: Marvel Scale
shortEffect: Increases Defense to 1.5x with a major status ailment.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5x its Defense.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

name: Mega Launcher
shortEffect: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5x their power.
fullEffect: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5x their power.

name: Merciless
shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.

name: Mimicry
shortEffect: Changes type depending on the terrain.
fullEffect: Changes the Pokemon's type depending on the terrain.

name: Minus
shortEffect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when a friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon has 1.5x its Special Attack if any friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.  If either ability is disabled by gastro acid, both lose their effect.

name: Mirror Armor
shortEffect: Reflects any stat-lowering effects.
fullEffect: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokemon receives.

name: Misty Surge
shortEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to misty terrain.

name: Mold Breaker
shortEffect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.

For example, this Pokemon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokemon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.

Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.  For example, cursed body only affects potential future uses of the move, while liquid ooze and shadow tag can only hinder a move's effect on the user.  This ablity cannot ignore type or form changes granted by abilities, for example color change or forecast; nor effects that were caused by abilities but are no longer tied to an ability, such as the rain from drizzle.  This ability cannot ignore multitype at all.

An ability ignored by this ability is only nullified while the move is being used.  For example, this Pokemon's moves can paralyze a Pokemon with limber, but Limber will activate and heal the paralysis immediately thereafter, and this Pokemon's spikes are not affected by this ability after they have been placed.

When this Pokemon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.

This ability functions identically to teravolt and turboblaze.

name: Moody
shortEffect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
fullEffect:
After each turn, one of this Pokemon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage.

If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.

name: Motor Drive
shortEffect: Absorbs electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
fullEffect:
Whenever an electric-type move hits this Pokemon, its Speed rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

This ability will not take effect if this Pokemon is immune to Electric moves.  Electric moves will ignore this Pokemon's substitute.

This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. thunder wave.

name: Moxie
shortEffect: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokemon.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Attack rises one stage upon knocking out another Pokemon, even a friendly Pokemon.

This ability does not take effect when the Pokemon indirectly causes another Pokemon to faint, e.g. through poison or spikes.

If this Pokemon knocks out a Pokemon with mummy, the former's ability will change without taking effect.

name: Multiscale
shortEffect: Halves damage taken from full HP.
fullEffect: This Pokemon takes half as much damage when it is hit having full HP.

name: Multitype
shortEffect: Changes arceus's type and form to match its held Plate.
fullEffect:
If this Pokemon is holding an elemental Plate, its type and form change to match the Plate.

This Pokemon's held item, whether or not it is a Plate, cannot be taken by covet or thief, nor removed by knock off, nor traded by switcheroo or trick.  Covet, Thief, and Knock Off still inflict damage against this Pokemon.  Unlike with sticky hold, this Pokemon cannot use fling, Switcheroo, or Trick to lose its item itself, nor gain an item through Switcheroo or Trick if it does not have one.

This ability has no effect for any Pokemon other than arceus.  This ability cannot be traded with skill swap, nor copied with role play or trace, nor disabled with gastro acid, nor changed with worry seed.  This Pokemon cannot use Skill Swap or Role Play to lose its ability itself.  mold breaker cannot ignore this ability.

If a Pokemon Transforms into an Arceus with this ability, it will Transform into Arceus's default, normal-type form.  If the Transforming Pokemon is holding a Plate, this ability will then activate and change the Pokemon into the corresponding form.

name: Mummy
shortEffect: Changes attacking Pokemon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a contact move hits this Pokemon, the attacking Pokemon's ability changes to Mummy.

multitype is unaffected.  If a Pokemon with moxie knocks this Pokemon out, the former's ability will change without taking effect.

name: Mycelium Might
shortEffect: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
fullEffect: The Pokemon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

name: Natural Cure
shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is cured of any major status ailment when it is switched out for another Pokemon.

If this ability is acquired during battle, the Pokemon is cured upon leaving battle before losing the temporary ability.

name: Neutralizing Gas
shortEffect: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokemon in battle.
fullEffect: While the Pokemon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokemon's Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

name: No Guard
shortEffect: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokemon hit.
fullEffect:
Moves used by or against this Pokemon never miss.

One-hit KO moves are unaffected.  Moves affected by this ability can hit Pokemon during the preparation turn of moves like dig or fly.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.

name: Normalize
shortEffect: Makes the Pokemon's moves all act normal-type.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves all act as if they were normal-type.

Moves that inflict typeless damage do so as usual.  Moves of variable type, such as hidden power, are affected.  They otherwise work as usual, however; weather ball, for example, is always forced to be Normal, but it still has doubled power and looks different during weather.

As thunder wave is prevented by immunities, unlike most non-damaging moves, it does not affect ghost-type Pokemon under the effect of this ability.

name: Oblivious
shortEffect: Prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be infatuated and is immune to captivate.

If a Pokemon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.

name: Opportunist
shortEffect: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.
fullEffect: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokemon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

name: Orichalcum Pulse
shortEffect: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
fullEffect: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokemon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokemon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

name: Overcoat
shortEffect: Protects against damage from weather.
fullEffect: This Pokemon does not take damage from weather.

name: Overgrow
shortEffect: Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its grass-type moves inflict 1.5x as much regular damage.

name: Own Tempo
shortEffect: Prevents confusion.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be confused.

If a Pokemon is confused and acquires this ability, its confusion will immediately be healed.

name: Parental Bond
shortEffect: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.
fullEffect: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.

name: Pastel Veil
shortEffect: Prevents the Pokemon and its allies from being poisoned.
fullEffect: Prevents the Pokemon and its teammates from being poisoned. It also cures teammates of poisoning when it enters the battlefield.

name: Perish Body
shortEffect: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokemon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon with Perish Body is hit with a contact move, both the attacker and the Pokemon with Perish Body will faint in three turns.

name: Pickpocket
shortEffect: Steals attacking Pokemon's held items on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, if it does not have a held item, it steals the attacker's held item.

This Pokemon cannot steal upon being knocked out.  It can steal if the attacker has a substitute, but cannot steal when its own Substitute is hit.  If a move hits multiple times, only the last hit triggers this ability.  If this Pokemon is wild, it cannot steal from a trained Pokemon.

name: Pickup
shortEffect: Picks up other Pokemon's used and Flung held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.
fullEffect:
At the end of each turn, if another Pokemon consumed or Flung a held item that turn, this Pokemon picks up the item if it is not already holding one.  After each battle, this Pokemon has a 10% chance of picking up an item if it is not already holding one.

The air balloon and eject button cannot be picked up.

The items that may be found vary by game, and, since Pokemon Emerald, by the Pokemon's level.  This ability is checked after the battle ends, at which point any temporary ability changes have worn off.

name: Pixilate
shortEffect: Turns the bearer's normal moves into fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3x their power.
fullEffect: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into fairy moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3x their power.

name: Plus
shortEffect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x when a friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon has 1.5x its Special Attack if any friendly Pokemon has plus or minus.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.  If either ability is disabled by gastro acid, both lose their effect.

name: Poison Heal
shortEffect: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
fullEffect: If this Pokemon is poisoned, it will heal for 1/8 of its maximum HP after each turn rather than taking damage.  This includes bad poison.

name: Poison Point
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokemon on contact.
fullEffect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

name: Poison Puppeteer
shortEffect: Pokemon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
fullEffect: When a Pokemon is poisoned by any of Pecharunt's moves, it will also become confused.

name: Poison Touch
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokemon upon contact.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning the target with each hit.

This counts as an extra effect for the purposes of shield dust.  This ability takes effect before mummy.

name: Power Of Alchemy
shortEffect: When an ally faints, this Pokemon gains its Ability.
fullEffect: When an ally faints, this Pokemon gains its Ability.

name: Power Spot
shortEffect: Just being next to the Pokemon powers up moves.
fullEffect: "The power of moves used by the allies of the Pokemon with Power Spot is increased by 30%."

name: Prankster
shortEffect: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by one stage.

name: Pressure
shortEffect: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokemon by one.
fullEffect:
Moves targetting this Pokemon use one extra PP.

This ability stacks if multiple targets have it.  This ability still affects moves that fail or miss.  This ability does not affect ally moves that target either the entire field or just its side, nor this Pokemon's self-targetted moves; it does, however, affect single-targetted ally moves aimed at this Pokemon, ally moves that target all other Pokemon, and opponents' moves that target the entire field.  If this ability raises a move's PP cost above its remaining PP, it will use all remaining PP.

When this Pokemon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokemon have their encounter rate increased.

name: Primordial Sea
shortEffect: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes heavy rain.  Heavy rain has all the properties of rain dance and also causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

Heavy rain ends when this Pokemon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of delta stream and desolate land.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effects of heavy rain, including allowing Fire moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.

name: Prism Armor
shortEffect: Reduces super-effective damage to 0.75x.
fullEffect:
Super-effective damage this Pokemon takes is reduced to 0.75x.

This Ability is not bypassed by mold breaker, teravolt, or turboblaze.

name: Propeller Tail
shortEffect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
fullEffect: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokemon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

name: Protean
shortEffect: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.
fullEffect:
Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

The type change takes place just before the move is used.

name: Protosynthesis
shortEffect: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokemon is holding Booster Energy.

name: Psychic Surge
shortEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon enters battle, it changes the terrain to psychic terrain.

name: Punk Rock
shortEffect: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.
fullEffect: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokemon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

name: Pure Power
shortEffect: Doubles Attack in battle.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Attack is doubled in battle.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

This ability functions identically to huge power.

name: Purifying Salt
shortEffect: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
fullEffect: The Pokemon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

name: Quark Drive
shortEffect: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
fullEffect: Boosts the Pokemon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokemon is holding Booster Energy.

name: Queenly Majesty
shortEffect: Opposing Pokemon cannot use priority attacks.
fullEffect: When an opposing Pokemon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokemon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.

name: Quick Draw
shortEffect: Enables the Pokemon to move first occasionally.
fullEffect: If a Pokemon with this Ability selects a damaging move, it has a 30% chance of going first in its priority bracket.

name: Quick Feet
shortEffect: Increases Speed to 1.5x with a major status ailment.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5x its Speed.  This Pokemon is not affected by the usual Speed cut from paralysis.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved.

name: Rain Dish
shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
fullEffect: This Pokemon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during rain.

name: Rattled
shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Speed rises one stage with each hit from a damaging dark-, ghost-, or bug-type move.

name: Receiver
shortEffect: When an ally faints, this Pokemon gains its Ability.
fullEffect: When an ally faints, this Pokemon gains its Ability.

name: Reckless
shortEffect: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2x their power.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's recoil moves and crash moves have 1.2x their base power.

struggle is unaffected.

The "crash moves" are the moves that damage the user upon missing: jump kick and high jump kick.

name: Refrigerate
shortEffect: Turns the bearer's normal moves into ice moves and strengthens them to 1.3x their power.
fullEffect: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into ice-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3x their power.

name: Regenerator
shortEffect: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokemon under any circumstances other than having fainted.

This ability does not take effect when a battle ends.

name: Ripen
shortEffect: Doubles the effect of berries.
fullEffect: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

name: Rivalry
shortEffect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25x against Pokemon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75x against the opposite gender.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon inflicts 1.25x as much regular damage against Pokemon of the same gender and 0.75x as much regular damage against Pokemon of the opposite gender.

If either Pokemon is genderless, damage is unaffected.

name: Rks System
shortEffect: Changes this Pokemon's type to match its held Memory.
fullEffect:
Changes this Pokemon's type to match its held Memory.

This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Silvally.

name: Rock Head
shortEffect: Protects against recoil damage.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon does not receive recoil damage from its recoil moves.

struggle's recoil is unaffected.  This ability does not prevent crash damage from missing with jump kick or high jump kick.

name: Rocky Payload
shortEffect: Powers up Rock-type moves.
fullEffect: Increases the power of Rock-type moves used by this Pokemon by 50%.

name: Rough Skin
shortEffect: Damages attacking Pokemon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

This ability functions identically to iron barbs.

name: Run Away
shortEffect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
fullEffect: This Pokemon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.

name: Sand Force
shortEffect: Strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3x their power during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
fullEffect: During a sandstorm, this Pokemon's rock-, ground-, and steel-type moves have 1.3x their base power.  This Pokemon does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.

name: Sand Rush
shortEffect: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Speed is doubled during a sandstorm, and it does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.

name: Sand Spit
shortEffect: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
fullEffect: The Pokemon creates a sandstorm when it's hit by an attack.

name: Sand Stream
shortEffect: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
The weather changes to a sandstorm when this Pokemon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokemon with this ability, drizzle, drought, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokemon will stay.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.

name: Sand Veil
shortEffect: Increases evasion to 1.25x during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
fullEffect:
During a sandstorm, this Pokemon has 1.25x its evasion, and it does not take sandstorm damage regardless of type.

The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.

name: Sap Sipper
shortEffect: Absorbs grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
fullEffect: Whenever a grass-type move hits this Pokemon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

name: Schooling
shortEffect: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.
fullEffect:
If this Pokemon is a wishiwashi and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.

This ability cannot be replaced, copied, or nullified.

name: Scrappy
shortEffect: Lets the Pokemon's normal and fighting moves hit ghost Pokemon.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon ignores ghost-type Pokemon's immunity to normal- and fighting-type moves.

Ghost Pokemon's other types affect damage as usual.

name: Screen Cleaner
shortEffect: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokemon.

name: Seed Sower
shortEffect: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon is hit by an attack.
fullEffect: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokemon is hit by an attack.

name: Serene Grace
shortEffect: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves have twice their usual effect chance.

An effect chance is a move's chance to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect.  For example, flamethrower's chance of burning the target is doubled, but protect's chance of success and air cutter's increased critical hit rate are unaffected.

secret power is unaffected.

name: Shadow Shield
shortEffect: When this Pokemon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon has full HP, regular damage (not fixed damage!) from moves is halved.

This ability cannot be nullified.

name: Shadow Tag
shortEffect: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.
fullEffect:
While this Pokemon is in battle, opposing Pokemon cannot flee or switch out.

Other Pokemon with this ability are unaffected.  Pokemon with run away can still flee.  Pokemon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.

name: Sharpness
shortEffect: Powers up slicing moves.
fullEffect: Increases the power of all 'slicing' moves by 50%.

name: Shed Skin
shortEffect: Has a 33% chance of curing any major status ailment after each turn.
fullEffect: After each turn, this Pokemon has a 33% of being cured of any major status ailment.

name: Sheer Force
shortEffect: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3x their power, but prevents their extra effects.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves with extra effects have 1.3x their power, but lose their extra effects.

An effect chance is a move's chance to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect. For example, thunder shock's paralysis is an extra effect, but thunder wave's is not, nor are knock off's item removal and air cutter's increased critical hit rate.

Moves that lower the user's stats are unaffected.

name: Shell Armor
shortEffect: Protects against critical hits.
fullEffect:
Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokemon.

This ability functions identically to battle armor.

name: Shield Dust
shortEffect: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is immune to the extra effects of moves used against it.

An extra effect is a move's chance, listed as an "effect chance", to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect.  For example, thunder shock's paralysis is an extra effect, but thunder wave's is not, nor are knock off's item removal and air cutter's increased critical hit rate.

name: Shields Down
shortEffect: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon enters battle and at the end of each turn, if its HP is 50% or above, it changes into Meteor Form; otherwise, it changes into Core Form.  In Meteor Form, it cannot be given a major status ailment (though existing ones are not cured), cannot become drowsy from yawn, and cannot use rest (which will simply fail).

This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Minior.

name: Simple
shortEffect: Doubles the Pokemon's stat modifiers.  These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.
fullEffect:
Each stage of this Pokemon's stat modifiers acts as two stages.  These doubled stages are still limited to a minimum of -6 and a maximum of 6.

This Pokemon can still accumulate less than -3 or more than 3 stages of stat modifiers, even though the extra ones have no effect after doubling.

name: Skill Link
shortEffect: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.
fullEffect: This Pokemon always hits five times with two-to-five-hit moves, such as icicle spear.  It also bypasses the accuracy checks on triple kick's second and third hits.

name: Slow Start
shortEffect: Halves Attack and Speed for five turns upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Attack and Speed are halved for five turns upon entering battle.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during battle.  If this Pokemon loses its ability before the five turns are up, its Attack and Speed return to normal; if it then regains this ability without leaving battle, its Attack and Speed are halved again, but the counter keeps counting from where it was.

name: Slush Rush
shortEffect: During Hail, this Pokemon has double Speed.
fullEffect: During Hail, this Pokemon has double Speed.

name: Sniper
shortEffect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3x damage rather than 2x.
fullEffect: This Pokemon inflicts triple damage with critical hits, rather than the usual double damage.

name: Snow Cloak
shortEffect: Increases evasion to 1.25x during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
fullEffect:
During hail, this Pokemon has 1.25x its evasion, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in snow.

name: Snow Warning
shortEffect: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
fullEffect:
The weather changes to hail when this Pokemon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokemon with this ability, drizzle, drought, or sand stream are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokemon will stay.

name: Solar Power
shortEffect: Increases Special Attack to 1.5x but costs 1/8 max HP after each turn during strong sunlight.
fullEffect: During strong sunlight, this Pokemon has 1.5x its Special Attack but takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn.

name: Solid Rock
shortEffect: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon takes 0.75x as much damage from moves that are super effective against it.

This ability functions identically to filter.

name: Soul Heart
shortEffect: This Pokemon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokemon faints.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Special Attack rises by one stage every time any Pokemon faints.

name: Soundproof
shortEffect: Protects against sound-based moves.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon is immune to moves flagged as being sound-based.

heal bell is unaffected.  uproar still prevents this Pokemon from sleeping.  This Pokemon can still receive a Perish Song counter through baton pass, and will retain a Perish Song counter if it acquires this ability after Perish Song is used.

howl, roar of time, sonic boom, and yawn are not flagged as sound-based.

name: Speed Boost
shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Speed rises one stage after each turn.

name: Stakeout
shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves have double power against Pokemon that switched in this turn.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's moves have double power against Pokemon that switched in this turn.

name: Stall
shortEffect: Makes the Pokemon move last within its move's priority bracket.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon moves last within its priority bracket.

Multiple Pokemon with this ability move in order of Speed amongst themselves.

The full incense and lagging tail take precedence over this ability; that is, Pokemon with these items move after Pokemon with this ability.  Pokemon with both this ability and one of these items are delayed as much as if they had only the item.

This ability works as usual during trick room: Pokemon with this ability will move in reverse order of Speed after Pokemon without it.

name: Stalwart
shortEffect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
fullEffect: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokemon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

name: Stamina
shortEffect: Raises this Pokemon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.
fullEffect: Raises this Pokemon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

name: Stance Change
shortEffect: Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.
fullEffect: Changes aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using kings shield.

name: Static
shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokemon on contact.
fullEffect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokemon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed.

Pokemon that are immune to electric-type moves can still be paralyzed by this ability.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, there is a 50% chance that encounters will be with an electric Pokemon, if applicable.

name: Steadfast
shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.
fullEffect: Whenever this Pokemon flinches, its Speed rises one stage.

name: Steam Engine
shortEffect: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokemon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.
fullEffect: Raises the user's Speed by three stages when it is hit by a Fire- or Water-type attack. The attack still deals damage.

name: Steelworker
shortEffect: This Pokemon's Steel moves have 1.5x power.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's Steel moves have 1.5x power.

name: Steely Spirit
shortEffect: Powers up ally Pokemon's Steel-type moves.
fullEffect: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokemon and its allies.

name: Stench
shortEffect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokemon flinch with each hit.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's damaging moves have a 10% chance to make the target flinch with each hit if they do not already cause flinching as a secondary effect.

This ability does not stack with a held item.

Overworld: The wild encounter rate is halved while this Pokemon is first in the party.

name: Sticky Hold
shortEffect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokemon.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's hold item cannot be removed by other Pokemon.

Damaging moves that would remove this Pokemon's item can still inflict damage against this Pokemon, e.g. knock off or pluck.  This Pokemon can still use moves that involve the loss of its own item, e.g. fling or trick.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the encounter rate while fishing is increased.

name: Storm Drain
shortEffect: Redirects single-target water moves to this Pokemon where possible.  Absorbs Water moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
fullEffect:
All other Pokemon's single-target water-type moves are redirected to this Pokemon, if it is an eligible target.  Other Pokemon's Water moves raise this Pokemon's Special Attack one stage, negating any other effect on it, and cannot miss it.

If the move's intended target also has this ability, the move is not redirected.  When multiple Pokemon with this ability are possible targets for redirection, the move is redirected to the one with the highest Speed stat, or, in the case of a tie, to a random tied Pokemon.  follow me takes precedence over this ability.

name: Strong Jaw
shortEffect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5x their power.
fullEffect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5x their power.

name: Sturdy
shortEffect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon is at full HP, any hit that would knock it out will instead leave it with 1 HP.  Regardless of its current HP, it is also immune to the one-hit KO moves: fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold.

If this Pokemon is holding a focus sash, this ability takes precedence and the item will not be consumed.

name: Suction Cups
shortEffect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokemon's moves.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon cannot be forced out of battle by moves such as whirlwind.

dragon tail and circle throw still inflict damage against this Pokemon.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the success rate while fishing is increased.

name: Super Luck
shortEffect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.
fullEffect: This Pokemon's moves have critical hit rates one stage higher than normal.

name: Supersweet Syrup
shortEffect: Once per battle, when a Pokemon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.
fullEffect: A sickly sweet scent spreads across the field the first time the Pokemon enters a battle, lowering the evasiveness of opposing Pokemon.

name: Supreme Overlord
shortEffect: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokemon that has been defeated.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

name: Surge Surfer
shortEffect: Doubles this Pokemon's Speed on Electric Terrain.
fullEffect: Doubles this Pokemon's Speed on Electric Terrain.

name: Swarm
shortEffect: Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5x damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
fullEffect:
When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its bug-type moves inflict 1.5x as much regular damage.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is increased.

name: Sweet Veil
shortEffect: Prevents friendly Pokemon from sleeping.
fullEffect: Prevents friendly Pokemon from sleeping.

name: Swift Swim
shortEffect: Doubles Speed during rain.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's Speed is doubled during rain.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

name: Sword Of Ruin
shortEffect: Lowers Defense of all Pokemon except itself.
fullEffect: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokemon except itself.

name: Symbiosis
shortEffect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
fullEffect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.

name: Synchronize
shortEffect: Copies burns, paralysis, and poison received onto the Pokemon that inflicted them.
fullEffect:
Whenever this Pokemon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, the Pokemon who gave this Pokemon that ailment is also given the ailment.

This ability passes back bad poison when this Pokemon is badly poisoned.  This ability cannot pass on a status ailment that the Pokemon did not directly receive from another Pokemon, such as the poison from toxic spikes or the burn from a flame orb.

Overworld: If the lead Pokemon has this ability, wild Pokemon have a 50% chance of having the lead Pokemon's nature, and a 50% chance of being given a random nature as usual, including the lead Pokemon's nature.  This does not work on Pokemon received outside of battle or roaming legendaries.

name: Tablets Of Ruin
shortEffect: Lowers Attack of all Pokemon except itself.
fullEffect: The power of the Pokemon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokemon except itself.

name: Tangled Feet
shortEffect: Doubles evasion when confused.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon is confused, it has twice its evasion.

name: Tangling Hair
shortEffect: When this Pokemon takes regular damage from a contact move, the attacking Pokemon's Speed lowers by one stage.
fullEffect: When this Pokemon takes regular damage from a contact move, the attacking Pokemon's Speed lowers by one stage.

name: Technician
shortEffect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5x their power.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves have 1.5x their power if their base power is 60 or less.

This includes moves of variable power, such as hidden power and magnitude, when their power is 60 or less.  helping hand's power boost is taken into account for any move, as is defense curl's power boost for rollout.

name: Telepathy
shortEffect: Protects against friendly Pokemon's damaging moves.
fullEffect: This Pokemon does not take damage from friendly Pokemon's moves, including single-target moves aimed at it.

name: Tera Shift
shortEffect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.
fullEffect: When the Pokemon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

name: Teravolt
shortEffect: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
fullEffect:
This Pokemon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.

For example, this Pokemon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokemon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.

Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.
